name: mostGetFBlockID, mostGetFunctionID, mostGetOpType
title: mostGetFBlockID, mostGetFunctionID, mostGetOpType
tables: Deprecated Function Please use the mostMessage and mostAMSMessage selectors FBlockID, FunctionID and OpType instead.
These functions return the FBlockID, FunctionID or OpType of the message.
msg Message variable of type mostMessage or mostAMSMessage

FblockId, FunctionId, OpType Note These values are determined independent of the message type and if applicable independent of the TelId. The Values are only valid if the message is out of the function catalog.
Note These values are determined independent of the message type and if applicable independent of the TelId. The Values are only valid if the message is out of the function catalog.
Note These values are determined independent of the message type and if applicable independent of the TelId. The Values are only valid if the message is out of the function catalog.
